remarks: Back on the market, Experience this sundrenched, 2 BR corner unit with over 1,000 sqft of living space and an HOA that includes Heat, Hot Water, Gas for $510 month. Largest floor plan in the community, on a treelined street in Downtown Stamford.   This elegant home blends generous space, timeless comfort, and effortless convenience, all just moments from the city's premier dining, shopping, parks, and medical facilities. Step inside to discover a bright and inviting layout framed by windows on multiple exposures, filling the home with natural light and picturesque views of Scalzi Park and the Rippowam River along with all the greenery throughout the seasons.     The thoughtfully designed galley kitchen with tile flooring, and a natural gas range, bringing a touch of luxury to your culinary space. Both bedrooms are large and enhanced with built-in storage. The full bath includes a classic tub/shower combination. Fully restored hardwood flooring. One assigned parking space plus ample street parking, Onsite laundry and extra storage space on first floor. Pet friendly community.   Whether you're an owner occupant seeking a large space or an investor looking for a high demand location, this condo stands out as a rare opportunity in one of Stamford's most desirable location across a park.
